ddls:
CREATE TABLE "gait_data" (
  "gait_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gait data entry */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient associated with the gait data */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "data_collection_date" TEXT /* Date of data collection */,
  "data_collection_time" TEXT /* Time of data collection */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the gait data */,
  "data_quality_score" REAL /* Quality score of the collected data */,
  "X_used" TEXT /* Features used for model training */,
  "X_shape" TEXT /* Shape of the feature data */,
  "feature_selection_method" TEXT /* Method used for feature selection */,
  "important_features_list" TEXT /* List of important features */,
  "important_feature_importances" TEXT /* Importance of each feature */,
  "model_used" TEXT /* Machine learning model used */,
  "mean_r2" REAL /* Mean R-squared value */,
  "CI" TEXT /* Confidence interval */,
  "min_r2" REAL /* Minimum R-squared value */,
  "Q1_r2" REAL /* First quartile R-squared value */,
  "Q2_r2" REAL /* Second quartile R-squared value */,
  "Q3_r2" REAL /* Third quartile R-squared value */,
  "max_r2" REAL /* Maximum R-squared value */,
  "MSE_mean" REAL /* Mean mean squared error */,
  "MSE_STD" REAL /* Standard deviation of mean squared error */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gait_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gait_data_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gait_data_model_used FOREIGN KEY ("model_used") REFERENCES models ("model_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the patient */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the patient */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the patient */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Medical history of the patient */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the patient */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the patient */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Emergency contact information */,
  "health_status" TEXT /* Current health status of the patient */,
  "last_visit_date" TEXT /* Date of the patient's last visit */,
  "next_visit_date" TEXT /* Date of the patient's next scheduled visit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of model (e.g., DecisionTreeRegressor, LinearRegression) */,
  "hyperparameters" TEXT /* Hyperparameters used for model training */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was created */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was last updated */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  "model_description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "training_data_source" TEXT /* Source of the training data */,
  "validation_data_source" TEXT /* Source of the validation data */,
  "test_data_source" TEXT /* Source of the test data */,
  "model_status" TEXT /* Status of the model (e.g., in development, deployed, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model performance entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model associated with the performance metrics */,
  "mean_r2" REAL /* Mean R-squared value */,
  "CI" TEXT /* Confidence interval */,
  "min_r2" REAL /* Minimum R-squared value */,
  "Q1_r2" REAL /* First quartile R-squared value */,
  "Q2_r2" REAL /* Second quartile R-squared value */,
  "Q3_r2" REAL /* Third quartile R-squared value */,
  "max_r2" REAL /* Maximum R-squared value */,
  "MSE_mean" REAL /* Mean mean squared error */,
  "MSE_STD" REAL /* Standard deviation of mean squared error */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date when the model performance was evaluated */,
  "training_time" TEXT /* Time taken to train the model */,
  "validation_time" TEXT /* Time taken to validate the model */,
  "test_time" TEXT /* Time taken to test the model */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  "training_set_size" INTEGER /* Size of the training dataset */,
  "validation_set_size" INTEGER /* Size of the validation dataset */,
  "test_set_size" INTEGER /* Size of the test dataset */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performance_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gait_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the feature */,
  "feature_type" TEXT /* Type of the feature (e.g., temporal, spatial) */,
  "feature_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the feature */,
  "feature_source" TEXT /* Source of the feature (e.g., sensor, video) */,
  "feature_quality_score" REAL /* Quality score of the feature */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the gait data */,
  "gait_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gait data accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "user_role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, clinician, researcher) */,
  "access_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the access session */,
  "access_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations about the access event */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_gait_id FOREIGN KEY ("gait_id") REFERENCES gait_data ("gait_id")
)
